title: Implement virtual machine host security in Azure
summary: Learn how to protect and harden your virtual machines in Azure

sections.summary: Learn how to protect and harden your virtual machines in Azure

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Security
lessons.content_md:
Discover the tools that Azure provides to help you design a secure environment throughout your infrastructure, data, network, and applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Plan your Linux environment in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about standards and practices for planning, deploying, managing, and optimizing Linux VMs in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-your-linux-environment-in-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Create a Windows virtual machine in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn to create an Azure virtual machine in minutes that can be used like a local physical desktop or server.

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement virtual machine host security in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement virtual machine host security in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
